resume_text:
Software Engineer II — Meridian Technologies (2021–Present)
• Real-time event pipeline in Python/Kafka, 50K+ events/min, 99.95% uptime
• Led Django-to-microservices migration, cut deploy time from 45min to 5min
• Mentored 2 junior engineers, both promoted within 18 months

Junior Software Engineer — Crestline Software (2019–2021)
• REST APIs serving 10M+ requests/day
• Reduced API response time by 35% via query optimization and Redis caching

B.S. Computer Science (2019) | Python, React, Docker, K8s, AWS

Senior Marketing Manager — Halcyon Brands (2022–Present)
• Own $3.2M annual digital marketing budget across paid, social, email
• Grew organic blog traffic from 15K to 85K sessions/month in 14 months
• Redesigned email nurture program, improving CTR by 40%

Marketing Coordinator — BrightPath Consumer Goods (2018–2022)
• Executed 20+ product launch campaigns across retail and e-commerce
• Managed influencer partnerships with 4.8% avg engagement rate

MBA Marketing (2018) | Google Ads, HubSpot, Salesforce, Tableau, SEO/SEM

Data Analyst — Foresight Analytics (2022–Present)
• Built automated reporting in Python/Airflow, replaced 30+ hrs/week manual Excel
• Tableau dashboards for $120M product line, used weekly by C-suite
• Churn modeling identified $2.4M at-risk revenue, recovered 60%

BI Intern — Lakeshore Financial (Summer 2021)
• SQL/Power BI reports for compliance, cut audit prep time by 50%

B.S. Statistics (2022) | SQL, Python, Tableau, Power BI, Airflow, dbt

RN, ICU — Summit Medical Center (2021–Present)
• Direct care for 4–6 ICU patients per shift, 94% satisfaction score
• Charge nurse 2–3 shifts/week, coordinating staffing and rapid response
• Precepted 12 new graduate nurses, 100% retention at 1 year

RN, Med-Surg — Riverbend Hospital (2018–2021)
• Managed 5–7 patient loads, trained in IV therapy and telemetry
• Falls Prevention Committee: helped reduce patient falls 28%

BSN (2018) | ACLS, PALS, CCRN | Critical care, Epic EMR

Senior Financial Analyst — Westbrook Capital (2022–Present)
• 3-statement models and DCF valuations for 8 mid-market companies
• Identified $1.8M in annual cost savings via vendor consolidation
• Automated recurring reports with Python/VBA, saving 15 hrs/month

Financial Analyst — Ridgeline Manufacturing (2020–2022)
• Owned annual budgeting for $75M business unit
• Pricing analysis for 200+ SKUs, improved gross margin by 1.4pp

B.S. Finance (2020), CFA Level II | Excel, Python, SQL, Bloomberg

Software Developer — Terrace Digital (2022–Present)
• Maintain mid-size e-commerce app in Node.js/React
• Fix bugs reported by QA, implement minor feature enhancements
• Helped migrate some legacy jQuery components to React

Junior Developer — ByteWorks LLC (2020–2022)

B.S. Computer Science (2020) | JavaScript, React, Node.js, PHP, Git

Marketing Intern — Cascade Media Group (Summer 2020)

B.A. Communications (2020) | Hootsuite, Mailchimp, Canva, Google Analytics

B.S. Accounting (2019) | QuickBooks, Excel, AP/AR, bank reconciliations

Project Coordinator — Bridgewater Construction (2021–Present)

• Assist project manager with monthly client progress reports

• Order office supplies when inventory is low

• Restocked shelves and handled returns

• Pick and pack orders for shipment using handheld scanner

• Keep work area clean per safety guidelines

• Took customer orders at drive-through window

Retail Sales — Foot Locker (2022–Present)
• Assist customers with finding products in their size

• Maintain store displays and restock merchandise

• Handled cash and card payments

Some college coursework (2020–2021, did not complete) | POS, cash handling

Landscaping — GreenScape Services (2019–2021)

High school diploma (2019) | Basic plumbing, electrical, drywall, hand tools
